name: Bi-Omstilling Maridalen
description: Bi-Omstilling (Bi-O) is working for transition within areas defined by how far bees reach from their hive. (Bi=Bee, Omstilling=Transition) We are operating an organic garden project in Maridalen, a cultural heritage landscape north of Oslo which also contains the Maridalen lake, which is serving the city of Oslo with 85% of its drinking water. We will start beekeeping from the 2024 season, and at the same time invite the appr. 1000 inhabitants living within the area to participate in creating a carbon negative society within 2030. We will also work to encourage the local farmers and gardeners to go all organic and increase local food production. Since the project site is within 20 min. by bus from Oslo, with 600 000 inhabitants, we believe it can have a more general impact as well. *** Bi-Omstilling (Bi-O) jobber for omstilling innenfor områder definert av hvor langt biene når fra bikuben. Vi driver et økologisk hageprosjekt i Maridalen, et kulturminnelandskap nord for Oslo som også inneholder Maridalsvannet, som betjener Oslo by med 85 % av sitt drikkevann. Vi starter birøkt fra sesongen 2024, og inviterer samtidig de ca. 1000 innbyggere som bor i området for å være med på å skape et karbonnegativt samfunn innen 2030. Vi vil også jobbe for å oppmuntre de lokale bøndene og hagedyrkerne til å dyrke økologisk og øke lokal matproduksjon. Siden prosjektet er innen 20 min. med buss fra Oslo, med 600 000 innbyggere, tror vi det også kan ha en mer generell innvirkning.

Omstilling Sagene (Oslo, Norge)
description: Sagene is an urban district in the centre of Oslo with approximately 35,000 inhabitants. Our group started in November 2010 and has since implemented a number of projects in the community. Here's a brief list of what our small group has managed to carry out with a tiny budget and lots of enthusiasm! annual bike repair workshop (donations given to an ecological orphanage in Thailand) "exchange markets" (byttemarked på norsk) storytelling course the Garden Trailer - challenging the street parking paradigm in Oslo the "Wish Tree" - local democracy in action! permaculture park gardening soil building project/local food production movie screenings with guest speakers and small group discussions vermiculture course sour dough bread baking course homebrewing course edible weeds in the city walk/cooking course lactic acid fermentation course gardening at kindergardens information displays - raising awareness about Omstilling Sagene and the Transition movement seed bomb stand permaculture dance workshop fruit press and jucing stand on Park(ing) Day with local pears and apples from the parks LETS.no - Norway's first local exchange trading system herbal butter demonstration stand jam and chutney course Friendship North/South cooperation with Ecobarrio Villa4Alamos inner Transition cabin trip (hytte tur på norsk) seminar about the "New Economy" in cooperation with Grønn Hverdag presentations and support for neighboring Transition Initiatives All of our courses are offered free of char...

name: The Co-operative Housing Federation of Norway (NBBL)
description: NBBL is a national membership association representing 41 co-operative housing associations. 12,700 affiliated housing co-operatives counting 510,000 housing units are managed by the member associations. These associations, their 1.020.000 members, the housing cooperatives and NBBL make up the Norwegian Co-operative Housing Movement. This makes NBBL the fourth largest membership movement in the country. The vision of the Norwegian Co-operative Housing Movement is to offer members the opportunity to attain a decent home in a sustainable living environment.

name: The Royal Norwegian Society for Rural Development (Norges Vel)
description: The Royal Norwegian Society for Development (Norges Vel) is a independent nonprofit organisation that aspires to promote thriving local communities where people can reside, work and live their lives. Norges Vel is Norway's oldest nation-wide member organisation, engaging in local development work ever since 1809.
